name: Lemon Chicken in Pastry Shells
recipeIngredient: Pepperidge Farm® Frozen Puff Pastry, 10 ounces (1 package)
Skinless, Boneless Chicken Breasts, 1 pound (cut into cubes)
Chicken Gravy Jars, 12 ounces each (2 jars)
Dried Thyme Leaves, Crushed, ¼ teaspoon
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the pastry shells according to package directions.
2. Heat vegetable oil in a medium skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add chicken in two batches and cook until browned, stirring often. Set aside.
4. Pour off excess fat.
5. Add gravy, lemon juice, thyme, and vegetables. Bring to a boil.
6. Return chicken to the pan; reduce heat to low.
7. Cover and cook for 5 minutes or until the chicken is no longer pink.
8. Serve in pastry shells. Use a combination of fresh vegetables or 1 bag (16 ounces) frozen vegetable mix.
